subcodes.first_line: This is a Book unto one of the handmaidens of God, that she may be mindful of the remembrance of her Lord, the Most High, the Most Great. O My handmaiden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب لامه من اماء الله لتکون متذکره بذکر ربها العلی العظیم ان یا امتی ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
